name: Emanation (Shame)
scaffolding_intent: Emits shame/embarrassment particles around the entity

parameters.name: tint
parameters.description: RGB tint shift applied to entity pixels (additive)

parameters.name: tintSaturation
parameters.description: How strongly the tint is applied (0 = no tint, 1 = full tint)

correction_intent: Child described the wrong TEMPERATURE or EMOTION. For OBJECTS (pot, coffee, iron, stove): the child said it is cold/cool but it is actually HOT — steam or heat is rising from it. For CHARACTERS: the child described the wrong emotion — the character actually feels ashamed, embarrassed, or guilty.
suggestion_intent: Child hasn't expressed that a character feels ashamed, embarrassed, or guilty
